description: Assign group labels to rblock facets for contact model application and filtering.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock facet group ...') via command interface

keywords.name: intersection
keywords.description: Specify if an intersection of group range elements is to be used. By default b is false . If set to true , two group range elements Specify number of facets matching for group assignment. By default i = 1 and the group is assigned to the contact if either facet is in the group. If i = 2, both facets must be in the group for the group to be assigned to the contact.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group name to slot slot .

keywords.name: tolerance
keywords.description: Specify the relative tolerance for determination of intersection and coplanarity of rigid blocks. The default value is 1e-8.

If i = 2, both facets must be in the group for the group to be assigned to the contact.

keywords.name: slot

keywords.name: tolerance
